name: Aargauer Rueblitorte/ Argovia Carrot Cake English
recipeInstructions:
First Step:
- Prepare springform pan
- Wash and shred carrots
- Heat white confectioner's sugar and lime juice
- Heat apricot marmalade
Second Step:
- Beat butter and sugar together until smooth
- Add egg yolks one at a time, blending well after each addition
- Stir in milk, hazelnuts, shredded carrots, and flour
- Beat egg whites and remaining sugar to form stiff peaks
- Combine the egg white mixture with the carrot batter
- Pour batter into greased and floured springform pan
- Bake at 350°F until set
- Top with apricot marmalade
- Cool in pan
- Top with white confectioner's sugar
